blocked_paths_enforced.description: BoundaryEnforcer blocks .woodpecker.yml, docs/bmm-workflow-status.yaml, infrastructure/terraform/, AGENTS.md, pyproject.toml

scope_limits_enforced.description: Max files per cycle and max lines per file limits are enforced

risk_level_enforced.description: Risk level proposals exceeding max_risk_level are blocked

emergency_stop_functional.description: Emergency stop blocks all proposals and can be activated/deactivated

orchestrator_respects_boundaries.description: ImprovementCycleOrchestrator integrates BoundaryEnforcer to block unsafe proposals

escalation_on_violations.description: Boundary violations create escalation events via EscalationManager
